---
title: "Research"
subtitle: "Posts about papers, events, news, and more"
description-meta: "Posts about papers, events, news, and more"
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
listing: 
  - id: news-posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    page-size: 100
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    feed: true
    contents: 
        - posts
        - posts/post-links.yml  # Use this file to add external links
  #      categories: [] 
  - id: selected-work
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Selected Work"
  - id: peer-reviewed
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Peer-reviewed Journal Paper"

## First run: python xlsx_to_yml.py to convert publications.xlsx to publications.yml
## then run quarto render to generate the publications.html file, need pub-listing.ejs and pub-listing.css in the same folder
 
css: pub-listing.css
filters: [remove-stray-divfence.lua]  # This filter is used to remove stray ":::" strings that leak into the HTML output when Quarto's listing wrapper fenced divs are interrupted by raw HTML blocks from the EJS template.
---

:::{#news-posts}
:::

## Publications

:::{#selected-work}
:::
